title: Sith medical kit
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Conjecture}}
[[File:Sith_medkit_VD.jpg|thumb|200px|[[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious's]] medical kit.]]
A '''medical kit''' was a case of special potions and medical equipment engineered for use by the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lords of the Sith]].

This medical kit was used by [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]] to treat his wounded [[Sith apprentice/Legends|apprentice]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], following his duel with [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] on [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]]. The contents of the kit included vials of injectable [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] and [[Bota/Legends|bota]], injector power cells, wireless [[defibrillator]], cardiovascular monitors, injector handle and head, resuscitating ventilator, adaptors for pressor field generator, and filtration transpirators.
